titleStmt.title: SII 24.52: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 52. (A.R. No. 18 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers the repayment of a loan of 400 kaḻañju by sale of 6 vēli of tax-free land by the sabhā of Chandralēkhai-chaturvēdimaṅgalam which had raised this amount from God Ānantanārāyaṇasvāmi at Śrīraṅgam in the 10th year of Madurai koṇḍa kōp-Parakēsari (Parāntaka I), having paid the interest thereon regularly. The record is dated in the 10th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari(l) Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil pon nemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamaka ttu vikkiramat toḻilāl caṭkara koṭṭattup putumaṇam puṇarn=ta matavaraiyiṭṭam vayirākattu vāri Ayal muṉaik kontaḷavaracar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittuk toḷ valikāṭṭip poṟppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenṟicait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potum
maiyum ponniyāṭai nannilap pāvaiyuṉ taṉimaiyun tavira vantu punita tirumaṇi makuṭa murimaiyi ṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnilaven tar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟappac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yirunila viḷāka meṅkaṇum tanātu tirunikaḻ veṇṇilāt tikaḻa vorutani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟ tiypān=tarattu pūpālar tiṟai viṭu tanta katañco
rikaḷuṟu muṟai niṟpa viḷaṅkiya tenṉavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponṉakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinṉā �l niṟp piḻai yennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetirk ko(ṭ)ṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭu venat tuṅkapattirai yaḷavuṟṟeṅkaṇaṇum tanātu paṭṭa veṅkaḷuṟu miṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa veṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa viḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟu
ṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalun talaivirittalamara kuṭaticait taṉnāḷ ḷukantu tānun tātaiyum panṉāḷiṭ yantetir māṟiya jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu koṭutta pukaḻin celviyumāḷāviṭṭa maṭantayariṭṭamu miḷātu koṭutta veṅkari niraikaḷuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇamenaṉum pāṇiyiraṇṭu cak koṇṭāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkalum polla viramun tiyākam vi
siṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷina kovirājakesari panmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka 10 pattāvatu kopparake Āvatu Ārkkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu brahmateyam cantiralekaiccaruppetimaṅkala[ ttu sabh] Aiyom śrīraṅgattu paḷḷi koṇ ṭaruḷina Anantanārāyaṇasuvāmi pakkal nāṅkaḷ maturai koṇṭa koppara kesari devaṟkku yāṇṭu 10
pattāvatu tanicu koṇṭu kaṭava pon 4 100 nāṉūṟṟu kaḻañcara m kaṭava palicai Iṭṭatu nīkki Ivvāṇṭuvarai kaṭavomāna p ponnāṉa pon 4 100 kumāka Iccantiralekaic caruppetimaṅ kalattu sabhai ṭu paṟṟukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkkellai tiripuvanamātevi vāykkālukku meṟkkum tenpāṟke
llai Iñciṭṭa maṅkalattu nattattu to ṭilli maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum Uḷppaṭa Itaṟkku va laikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ maṅkalattu naṭuvu niyamattukke pona peruvaḻik vvican=ta perunāṉ ṉṉilam Oḻivinṟi nirpūci nel viḷaivatum maṉaiyum Ūrnattamum Uṭppaṭṭa nellum Uṭpa
ṉaṭuvu paṭṭa nilam muveli ṉ vatikku meṟkum tiruve kku kiḻakkum vaṭapā vāykkāl tiripuvana vāykkālukku teṟkkum Ivvicainta peru nāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭ bhai mahā devar munnuṭaiya nilam kaiyūr mahādevar munnuṭaiyanila
nikki ninṟa nilam muveliyum Āka Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa kaḻañcukkum kaḻañcina vāykala poliūṭṭup paṟṟa viṟṟa (?) ttom śrīraṅkattu
timaṅkalattu nilattāl vanta m kaṭava ponnum nellum Āvāntirakkuṭimaiyum veliyālum cantirātitta vaṟ nāṅkaḷe Iṟu kkaṭṭup palakai kāṇicce Inni veli
Iṟuttu cuṭṭina Aṟuveli �kkinta Āṟu kal lik koṇṭu pāccavum pārkkavum � vum Ikkuṭikaḷ Innilañcuṭṭi Eppeṟppaṭṭa kap peṟuvatākavum Innila Aṟu veliyum
nilam viṭṭuk kuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum vācalk kaḷatteyum nāṭap peṟuvārākavum na rākavum Ipparicu Oṭṭi viṟṟu vilaiyā vaṇañceytu
ṇaiyānen meṟkku ninṟu kka ponta vāykkāl paḻampaṭi nirpāyppe
nūṟṟeṇman cātta Aṟiven mo nāṭṭu maṇa nāṭṭu yalūr koḷḷipāṟkkiḻān kiran ṉakkaneṉ Ivai
subbramaṇyakkiramavittanen Ivai tirakkiramavittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven Eṭṭukkūr subbramaṇṇyakkiramavitta
devan tiruvaraṅka nārā nārāyaṇan neṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven Irātitaran Aṭikaḷ tatta
Digital edition of SII 24.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
